title: is not null syntax error
poc: select id from t1 where f1() IS NOT NULL;
select id from t1 where f1() is";
key_bug_features: using IS NOT NULL with undefined function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT, name VARCHAR(50), value DECIMAL(10, 2), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test', 10.50);
SELECT id FROM t1 WHERE f1() IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM t1 WHERE value IS NOT NULL OR f1() IS NOT NULL;
